title: Turbulence-Lab Invariant Group — integer exponents for a scale-free dimensionless number
strategies: trivial: emit a fixed weakly-cancelling reference group (eps*L/U^2) -> reproduces the baseline ~0.1
greedy: brute-force support<=2 integer exponents minimizing train log-spread -> a two-channel partial ratio, mediocre
strong: support<=3 search scored by the worst of two disjoint Reynolds sub-regimes -> recovers the three-channel physical invariant (dissipation zeroth law eps*L/U^3) that generalizes off-regime
alternatives: PCA smallest log-variance direction rounded to integers, cross-validated regularized search, Buckingham-Pi reasoning over inferred channel dimensions
